description.ko: 기하학적 글리치 아트를 통해 투영된 쿠로-X의 정교한 비주얼입니다. 이 작품은 완벽한 수학적 형상과 디지털 오류의 미학이 교차하는 지점을 탐구하며, 역동적이고 파편화된 테크 누아르 풍경을 선사합니다.
description.en: A sophisticated visual representation of KURO-X through the lens of geometric glitch art. This piece explores the intersection of perfect mathematical shapes and the beauty of digital errors, resulting in a dynamic, shattered tech-noir landscape.

prompt: A high-tech digital composition featuring the KURO-X logo integrated into a geometric glitch environment. Sharp angular shapes, fractured polygons, and displaced pixel clusters create a sense of digital instability. The color palette consists of deep obsidian black, electric cyan, and neon magenta. Features chromatic aberration, scanlines, and high-contrast lighting to emphasize a futuristic tech-noir aesthetic. 8k resolution, hyper-detailed, synthwave influence, sharp edges, and vector-style distortions.
